scripts.dev: sh -c 'SERVER_PORT=${SERVER_PORT:-3101}; WEB_PORT=${WEB_PORT:-5173}; VITE_PROXY_TARGET=${VITE_PROXY_TARGET:-http://127.0.0.1:${SERVER_PORT}}; PORT=${SERVER_PORT} bun run --filter @zhidu/server dev & SERVER_PID=$!; VITE_PROXY_TARGET=${VITE_PROXY_TARGET} bun run --filter @zhidu/web dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${WEB_PORT}; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill ${SERVER_PID}; wait ${SERVER_PID} 2>/dev/null; exit ${EXIT_CODE}'
scripts.start: sh -c 'SERVER_PORT=${SERVER_PORT:-3101}; WEB_PORT=${WEB_PORT:-8080}; VITE_PROXY_TARGET=${VITE_PROXY_TARGET:-http://127.0.0.1:${SERVER_PORT}}; PORT=${SERVER_PORT} bun run --filter @zhidu/server start & SERVER_PID=$!; VITE_PROXY_TARGET=${VITE_PROXY_TARGET} bun run --filter @zhidu/web preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${WEB_PORT}; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill ${SERVER_PID}; wait ${SERVER_PID} 2>/dev/null; exit ${EXIT_CODE}'
